_comment: Template for SMB share migration / backup-share config. Copy to Config_shareMig.json and fill in the real values. The script reads this file together with config.json.

ShareMigration._comment_DomainController: DomainController fields MUST be IP addresses (not FQDN). ONTAP preferred-dc API rejects hostnames. Can be a single string or array of IPs.
ShareMigration._comment_DiscoveryMode: Explicit discovery-mode override: 'site', 'none', or 'all'. If null, auto-computed: site-name set → site, DC set → none, neither → all. Use explicit when auto-logic doesn't match AD topology (e.g. subnets moved to another domain's Sites & Services).
ShareMigration._comment_Dns: Source/DestinationDnsServers+DnsDomains: used by DomainMigration to switch DNS before domain join. Source values enable rollback if migration fails.
ShareMigration._comment_DomainMigration: SourceDomainCredentialName/User = domain admin for CIFS delete (leave source domain). DestinationDomainCredentialName/User = domain admin for CIFS create (join dest domain). Both required only for -Mode DomainMigration.

Pairs._comment: For same-SVM domain migration, set DestinationCluster/Vserver to the SAME as Source. The SVM stays, only the domain changes.
Pairs.Name: Example_Migration
